title: Returning Standalone Cloud-Served Licenses
text: Returning Standalone Cloud-Served Licenses You may wish to return a standalone cloud-served license on one machine to use it on another machine. To return this license, you can do either of the following: Open the Return License utility from the Start menu on Windows, enter the Entitlement ID of the license you wish to return, and click Return License . Run the Uniface License Management utility from the command line with the /ret { EntitlementId } command. For more information, see Uniface License Management Utility (ulic) . Related Links Install the Uniface Community Edition The Uniface 10 Community Edition is a free version of Uniface that enables new and experienced developers, and others interested in Uniface 10 to explore, learn, and use Uniface 10 to build and test applications. Return Sentinel Licenses for the Community Edition If you want to install the Uniface Community Edition on a different machine, you have to return the license from your existing machine. Install the Uniface Enterprise Edition on Windows Procedure to install Uniface Enterprise Edition on Windows. Installing and Configuring Uniface on Unix and Linux Platforms To install Uniface on Unix and Linux platforms run the installation program. After installation, you can configure Uniface to work with your preferred databases and web servers. Manually Configure Sentinel Licenses on Linux Normally, the Uniface installer automatically configures the Sentinel license environment on Linux. However, if you ran the installer without root privileges, or you choose the manual configuration option for some other reason, you must manually configure license management. Was this topic helpful?
